rationale: Corpus has only 2 points in 'Entry/Associate': Dragos Associate Technical Support Engineer ($72,000, plausible) and Drata Associate Technical Support Engineer - Mexico ($382,500). The Drata figure is very likely a data-extraction artifact (probably a non-USD currency misread as USD, or an OTE/multi-year figure, given the Mexico location and the implausibility of a $382.5K entry-level support salary) and should not be trusted as-is. With the unreliable point excluded, only 1 usable anchor ($72K, below current p50 $95K) remains - too thin to raise confidence. Keep low.
